166.reason: [This condition incorrectly assumes there are at least two characters left; if i is the last index, line[i + 1] is out of bounds, causing undefined behavior. Also, it fails to handle valid single-character constants like 'a' correctly when they appear at the end of a line.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition incorrectly assumes there are at least two characters left; if i is the last index, line[i + 1] is out of bounds, causing undefined behavior. Also, it fails to handle valid single-character constants like 'a' correctly when they appear at the end of a line.]
